message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle bold
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam classFontColor #333333
skinparam classFontName Arial
skinparam classFontSize 12
skinparam classPadding 5
skinparam classMargin 10
skinparam classStereotypeFontStyle italic
skinparam classStereotypeFontColor #666666
skinparam classStereotypeFontSize 10
skinparam classStereotypeFontName Arial
skinparam classStereotypeBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
skinparam classStereotypeBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam classStereotypeBorderThickness 1
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRadius 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderPadding 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderMargin 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderSpacing 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderGap 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderOffset 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderShift 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderSkew 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRotate 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScale 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTranslate 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransform 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderMatrix 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderPerspective 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRotate3d 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScale3d 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTranslate3d 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransform3d 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderMatrix3d 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderPerspective3d 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRotateX 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRotateY 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRotateZ 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScaleX 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScaleY 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScaleZ 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTranslateX 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTranslateY 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTranslateZ 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformOrigin 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformStyle 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBox 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxSize 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxSizing 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxAlign 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxJustify 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxDirection 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxWrap 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxOrder 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxFlex 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxFlexGrow 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxFlexShrink 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxFlexBasis 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxAlignSelf 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxAlignContent 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxJustifyContent 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxAlignItems 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxJustifyItems 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxPlaceContent 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxPlaceItems 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxPlaceSelf 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGrid 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridTemplateColumns 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridTemplateRows 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridTemplateAreas 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridAutoColumns 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridAutoRows 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridAutoFlow 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridRowGap 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridColumnGap 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridRow 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridColumn 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridArea 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridRowStart 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridRowEnd 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridColumnStart 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridColumnEnd 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridTemplate 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGrid 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridTemplateColumns 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridTemplateRows 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridTemplateAreas 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridAutoColumns 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridAutoRows 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridAutoFlow 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridRowGap 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridColumnGap 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridRow 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridColumn 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridArea 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridRowStart 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridRowEnd 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridColumnStart 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridColumnEnd 2
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxGridTemplate 2

class PatientStudioDriver {
}

class PatientAdapter {
  <<Proxy>>
  interviews
}

class InterviewStudioDriver {
  save(study, patient, interview)
}

class StudyStudioDriver {
}

class StudyAdapter {
  <<Proxy>>
  start(command, ...args)
  getInterviewItems(pageSet)
  apply(interviewItems)
}

class IMutationCommand {
}

class UpdateItemCommand {
  start(study, page, index)
  getInterviewItems(pageSet)
  apply(study, interviewItems)
}

PatientStudioDriver --> PatientAdapter
PatientAdapter ..> StudyAdapter : getInterviewItems(pageSet)
InterviewStudioDriver ..> StudyAdapter : apply(interviewItems)
StudyStudioDriver --> StudyAdapter
StudyAdapter ..> UpdateItemCommand : start(...)
StudyAdapter ..> UpdateItemCommand : apply(...)
UpdateItemCommand --|> IMutationCommand

@enduml
